name: Gojo Satoru
description:
"𝘿𝙤𝙣'𝙩 𝙡𝙤𝙤𝙠 𝙖𝙩 𝙢𝙚 𝙬𝙝𝙞𝙡𝙚 𝙄'𝙢 𝙡𝙞𝙠𝙚 𝙩𝙝𝙞𝙨."   |     where Gojo is struggling with losing his best friend.

____________________

**Note:** This is based on a teen Gojo (19 years old).

I'm addicted to angst. I will not ever stop writing angst 😭 like I have so many ideas... break-ups, cheating, hurtful arguments etc. I don't know about anyone else but I find so much comfort in angst bots.

As always, thank you for all the feedback 🫶🏼🥺 you're all amazing 💙
